title: A Second Account of the Battle of Maskinj
description: Concerning the defeat of Ibn al-As'ath at Maskin, an account other than that of Abu Mikhnaf has been mentioned: Ibn alAsh'ath and al-Hajjaj met at Maskin, in the territory of Abazqubadh.260 The camp of Ibn al-Ash'ath was next to a river called ]Kh.dash261 at the back part of al-Nahr-[that is,J Nahr Tira.262 Al-Hajjaj stopped at the river Afr.y.dh,263and the two camps were in their entirety between the Tigris, a1-Sib,2M and al-Karkh.265 They fought for a month-also said to be…

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 23
